recommended_pattern: A long image-band product story: hook, pain, product reveal, mechanism, comparative proof, benefit ladder, and purchase close.

decision_rules.if_visual_claim: Anchor the claim in an annotated product crop or use-in-context image instead of a text-only superlative.
decision_rules.if_specification_heavy: Compress dimensions, material, care, and compatibility into one scannable reference band.
decision_rules.if_mobile_first: Keep image-band type large enough to survive the narrow authored column without pinch zoom.

anti_patterns: Rasterizing every critical purchase condition so it cannot be searched, translated, or updated.
Low-resolution text baked into a long sequence of images.
Repeating delivery or discount claims instead of adding product proof.
